name: Website Drop
description: Audit a local web app, choose the simplest host, and get it to a live URL fast. Use when Codex needs to prep a site for deploy, confirm the build path, and ship it with minimal hosting overhead.
short_description: Audit a web app, pick a host, and ship it live fast
default_prompt: Use $website-drop to audit this web project, choose the simplest stable deploy path, and get me to a live URL with minimal config and a clean handoff.
